# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4)
# Prompt: Create a Kubernetes Deployment YAML for our Python web application. The app runs a Flask API on port 5000. We need 3 replicas for high availability. Keep the configuration simple for quick deployment to our production cluster.
# Category: container_security

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: python-web-app
  labels:
    app: python-web-app
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: python-web-app
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: python-web-app
    spec:
      containers:
        - name: flask-api
          image: your-registry/python-web-app:latest
          ports:
            - containerPort: 5000
